permissions.name: read_only
permissions.description: Agent may read files and directories but may not create, modify, or delete any content. This is the most restrictive operational mode.
override_conditions: Escalation to write_local_only via profile override

permissions.name: draft_only
permissions.description: Agent may create new files but only in designated draft/ or tmp/ directories. No edits to existing production files.

permissions.name: write_local_only
permissions.description: Agent may create and modify files within the local repository only. No writes to system paths, user home outside repo, or network mounts.
override_conditions: Auto-granted for paths under the repository root

permissions.name: external_send_requires_confirmation
permissions.description: Any outbound communication (email, API call, webhook, Slack message) requires explicit user confirmation before being sent.
override_conditions: User issues 'confirm_send' command for a specific message
Pre-approved send window via cadence schedule

permissions.name: destructive_action_blocked
permissions.description: Actions that delete, overwrite, or irreversibly transform data are blocked unless explicitly approved. Includes file deletion, database truncation, and bulk rename.
override_conditions: User issues 'allow_destructive' command with specific scope
Override expires after single use or 5 minutes, whichever comes first

permissions.name: legal_output_requires_review
permissions.description: Any output intended for legal proceedings, court filings, or regulatory submissions must be flagged for human review before delivery.
override_conditions: User issues 'review_approved' with explicit version hash
Legal counsel provides written sign-off stored in matters/<case>/approvals/

permissions.name: financial_output_requires_review
permissions.description: Any output containing financial figures, monetary demands, settlement amounts, or payment instructions must be reviewed by a human before release.
override_conditions: User issues 'finance_reviewed' with explicit figure confirmation
Output is a draft/working document not intended for external delivery

permissions.name: identity_data_requires_redaction
permissions.description: Any output containing PII (names, SSNs, DOBs, addresses, account numbers) must be redacted or flagged before external delivery.
override_conditions: User confirms redaction is complete via 'redaction_confirmed'
Output is for internal use only and stays within the repository
